label: Build Artifact
description: Scope → design → implement → verify → document a concrete deliverable.
success_criteria: An artifact exists on disk, it has been exercised at least once without error, and its purpose is documented.
author: system

states.name: scope
states.label: Define Scope
states.guidance: Write working_state['scope'] (>= 80 chars) describing what will exist when done, and list working_state['non_goals'] (>= 2 items) for what is explicitly out of scope.

states.name: design
states.label: Sketch Design
states.guidance: Produce working_state['design'] (>= 150 chars) describing the shape — interfaces, data flow, files to create. List working_state['files'] (>= 1 item) of planned paths.

states.name: implement
states.label: Implement
states.guidance: Create / edit the files listed in design. Record each edit as an entry in working_state['edits'] (list of {file, summary}).

states.name: verify
states.label: Verify
states.guidance: Exercise the artifact at least once — import it, run it, or test it. Record working_state['verification'] (>= 60 chars) describing what you ran and the outcome.

states.name: document
states.label: Document
states.guidance: Write working_state['doc'] (>= 120 chars) — what it is, how to use it, where it lives — and persist it to memory or a file.
